pages.text: $(l)Nexus Core$() — A deep purple crystal at the heart of certain world structures. Generates 12-block radius light, blocks visibility, and refuses to be moved by pistons.$(br2)$(l)Breaking it$() $(o)permanently$() rewrites a $(l)law of this world$() based on the nexus type embedded in the core.

$(l)Requirements to break:$()$(br)$(7)— Ascension Stage 3 or higher$()$(br)$(7)— The nexus must be unlocked (not in its crystal-revert cooldown)$()$(br2)Players below Stage 3 see a message and the block becomes unbreakable. Item form is creative-only — there is no recipe.
